subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath dawned and shone forth, and Whose light hath radiated and diffused, quickening the sanctified souls through His divine breath [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی اشرق و لاح و سطع نوره و باح و احیی الارواح القدسیه بالنفحه
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @praise and encouragement, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @spiritual transformation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
